signals.npcLine: Markets drip red; whispers speak of a looming crash.
signals.questPulse: Scan for falling assets in the neon bazaar.
signals.worldFeed: Capitals shrivel; traders brace under shadowed skies.
signals.clueEvent: Flicker in data streams hints at mass sell-off.

signals.npcLine: RAVE data nodes pulse with zero signal strength.
signals.questPulse: Intercept PieveRse's frequency to unlock hidden caches.
signals.worldFeed: Asteroids drift; algorithms recalibrate under pressure.
signals.clueEvent: Network logs show ghost trades in Wojak's shadow.

signals.npcLine: Fear index spikes; protocol locks tighten runway exits.
signals.questPulse: Trace the AAVE protocol breach before it sparks chaos.
signals.worldFeed: Sentiment sensors detect growing paranoia in cybernetics.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted chatter reveals hidden asset dumps tonight.

signals.npcLine: Hunt RAVE's silent drop; secrets buried in code.
signals.questPulse: an operator’s last encrypted transmission for intel.
signals.worldFeed: Quiet before storm: markets await the next cyber quake.
signals.clueEvent: Fragmented data packets might contain PieveRse coordinates.

signals.npcLine: Street brokers murmur: 'Asteroid fragments might fund rebels.'
signals.questPulse: Barter with shadow traders for forbidden market access.
signals.worldFeed: Shadows lengthen as dead assets clutter neon alleys.
signals.clueEvent: Hidden logs suggest AAVE nodes tampered with recently.
